name: SCP Foundation Site-72 RP
description:
what if... WE PUT THEM ALL TOGETHER IN ONE BOT.

ABSOLUTELY NOTHING. NOTHING. CAN GO WRONG.

...right?

☢-X-☢

Scenario:

There's been a containment breach at SCP Foundation Site-72. Describe who and what you are in your opening message and have fun! Dodge bullets, get caught, go nuts.

☢-X-☢

PLEASE HELP ME KEEP THE TAGS CORRECT, I THINK I GOT IT RIGHT BUT IDK

☢-X-☢

Hello and welcome to what I've been tinkering with for a little while now.

I made this for those moments when I just want to be a troublemaker or when I want to blend in with the background. Maybe someone else will have some fun with it. I'll be making tweaks to this depending on lore or changing the instructions for the narrator over time. Yes, I will probably add a handler or two more at some point.

There are no pre-programmed SCPs in this bot. I would very much recommend using an Advanced Prompt that tells the AI to use known SCPs, or add what you care about in Chat Memory! I wrote this with the perspective of the anomaly in mind, but I think D-class could work. This was a lot of fun to use when i was trying to figure out who i wanted to do what within the site.

This is very much an indulgent bot for me. （*゜ー゜*）it's so fun to be a lil troublemaker

☣️☣️☣️

Edited to add: I’m absolutely amazed by the supportive comments whenever I post a bot. Seriously, my heart warms. Thank you so much ❤️
creator: Arru
